text: Dashing through the snow, and a one horse open sleigh.
Oh, the fields we go, laughing all the way.
Bells on bobtails ring, making spirits bright.
What fun it is to laugh and sing a sleigh song tonight.
Jingle bells, jingle bells, jingle all the way.
Oh, what fun it is to ride in a one horse open sleigh.
Jingle bells, jingle bells, jingle all the way.
Oh, what fun it is to ride in a one horse open sleigh.
Day or two ago, I thought I'd take a ride.
And soon Miss Fanny Bright was seated by my side.
The horse was leaning length, Miss Fortune seemed his lot.
We got into a drifted bank, and then we got a spot.
Jingle bells, jingle bells, jingle all the way.
Oh, what fun it is to ride in a one horse open sleigh.
Jingle bells, jingle bells, jingle all the way.
Oh, what fun it is to ride in a one horse open sleigh.
